framework.name: AI Explainability as Trust Requirement
framework.description: Positions AI transparency not as technical requirement but as organizational trust-building mechanism. Decision-makers need to understand AI recommendations to accept them, creating intermediary role for explainer/translator.
framework.raw_quote: AI Explainability – Decision-makers need transparency in AI-driven recommendations to build trust.

source.title: How to Implement Six Sigma with AI - AI at work for all - secure AI agents, search, workflows
